_comment: L3 per-phase tool/skill scoping registry (#5768). Read by .claude/hooks/phase-surface-hint.sh (PostToolUse, matcher Skill). skill_to_phase maps a Skill-tool invocation to a workflow phase; phase_to_surface holds the additive, fail-open hint surface for that phase. Any skill absent from skill_to_phase yields no hint (full surface). Consistency asserted by .claude/hooks/phase-surface-hint.test.sh. See ADR-070.

brainstorm.not_live_note: implementation/ship skills (work, review, ship, merge-pr) are not relevant yet — decide WHAT before HOW.

plan.not_live_note: deploy/ship/merge skills are not relevant yet — produce the plan + tasks before implementing.

work.not_live_note: ship/merge skills come after review — finish implementation + tests first.

review.not_live_note: ship/merge skills run after review findings are resolved.

ship.not_live_note: this is the terminal phase — commit, push, PR, merge, verify deploy.
